# HTMX Doctor

Diagnose HTMX codebase health. Scans templates and scripts for security, performance, correctness, and accessibility issues, then outputs a 0-100 score with actionable diagnostics.

## Usage

Run this at your project root:

```bash
npx -y htmx-doctor@latest .
```

Use `--verbose` to see affected files and line numbers:

```bash
npx -y htmx-doctor@latest . --verbose
```

Use `--diff` to scan only changed files:

```bash
npx -y htmx-doctor@latest . --verbose --diff
```

Use `--score` to output only the numeric score:

```bash
npx -y htmx-doctor@latest . --score
```

Use `-y` to skip prompts:

```bash
npx -y htmx-doctor@latest . -y
```

## Options

```txt
Usage: htmx-doctor [directory] [options]

Options:
  -v, --version      display the version number
  --no-lint          skip HTMX checks
  --no-dead-code     skip dead code detection
  --verbose          show file details per rule
  --score            output only the score
  -y, --yes          skip prompts, scan all workspace projects
  --project <name>   select workspace project (comma-separated for multiple)
  --diff [base]      scan only files changed vs base branch or uncommitted changes
  --fix              open Ami to auto-fix all issues
  -h, --help         display help for command
```
